text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 29. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: The lawn mower is having issues starting. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. Let's get that resolved. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. My starting running back is questionable. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Scraping astrophotography files from Hubble. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I've indexed the research notes. Hubble raw FITS files are great. I'll track the download folder sync. I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. Grilling steaks and chicken on the deck tonight. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Perfect grilling weather! I've added hickory chips to the Costco list. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. We are planning a garage clean-up day this weekend. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! Good call on checking that. I'll add heavy-duty storage bins to the Costco list to help organize. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Great progress. He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Interesting. Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. That is a clean implementation. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! I've saved your custom configurations.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Planning a street block party soon. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Enjoy the grilling tonight!
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Managed to handle bedtime without too much screaming. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Reflections saved. Rest up for tomorrow!
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
